name: Cinnamon Bread Rolls
recipeIngredient: 24 slices soft white sandwich bread, crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the bread with a rolling pin.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese, 1/2 cup of sugar and yolks.
3. Spread the mixture on the bread.
4. Roll up the bread in a jelly-roll style.
5. Combine the cinnamon and remaining sugar.
6. Lightly dip the rolls in butter.
7. Place the rolls on greased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes. Yield: 2 dozen.
